mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedback (user_id, title, content, images, type, status, order_no, appointment_no, contact) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{images}, #{type}, 0, #{orderNo}, #{appointmentNo}, #{contact})
mapper.update: UPDATE feedback SET status = #{status}, handler_id = #{handlerId} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE feedback SET status = 2, process_result = #{processResult}, process_time = NOW(), handler_id = #{handlerId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT f.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar, h.nickname as handler_nickname FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user h ON f.handler_id = h.id WHERE f.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT f.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar, h.nickname as handler_nickname FROM feedback f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user h ON f.handler_id = h.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
